text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before the Satsuki Sho,<n>and Narita
Taishin encounters a<n>redheaded girl just as small
as her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin finds herself under a<n>barrage of
comments telling her that<n>no one expects anything
from her or<n>thinks she can win. Then the girl asks
if all of that makes her want to give<n>up.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin responds that she<n>won't give up
just because of other<n>people's opinions and that
she'll put<n>everyone to shame with her running.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, as if to make good on<n>her words,
Narita Taishin shows up to<n>race with an intensity
that<n>overwhelms her two rivals.
